highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 1.68.1.1 is a servicing patch on 1.68.1 with image decoding, HarfBuzz string and native build fixes.

bullets.detail: Fixes cases where images were decoded with the wrong colour or pixel handling, restoring correct output for common formats.

bullets.lead: HarfBuzz string handling and buffer overflows
bullets.detail: Corrects string marshalling in the HarfBuzz binding and cherry-picks upstream fixes for buffer-overflow bugs.

bullets.lead: Sample renderer picks a supported sample count
bullets.detail: Stops the sample surfaces asking for the maximum MSAA sample count, which some drivers refused.

bullets.lead: Weak-reference tracking cleaned up on removal
bullets.detail: TryRemove now clears the tracked WeakReference so long-lived object caches do not keep stale entries around.

bullets.lead: Native build modernised; Nano Server added
bullets.detail: Reworks the native build process and adds a Nano Server target so SkiaSharp runs in stripped-down Windows containers.

contributor_summaries.bender2k14: Sample cleanups — dropped an unused TaskScheduler argument and simplified the rotation matrix initialisation
contributor_summaries.daltonks: Cleaned up WeakReference tracking so TryRemove clears the stored reference

preview_summaries.1.68.1.1-p9: Preview 9 was the only preview cut for 1.68.1.1, bundling the image-decoding correction, HarfBuzz string fixes, buffer-overflow cherry-picks and the Nano Server build work.

harfbuzz_summary: Rolls the bundled HarfBuzz build forward to 2.6.1.1 with the native build-process modernisation.
